title: Verify cancellation flow when the discount offer is disabled from the backend
description: Tests that the 'Incentive' offer pop-up is correctly skipped in the cancellation flow if it is disabled via a backend configuration.
preconditions: User is in an active trial.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is turned OFF in the backend configuration.

steps.description: 3. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: The user is taken directly to the feedback pop-up after the loss aversion modal. The 'Incentive' offer pop-up is not displayed. The trial is cancelled.
